name: Test-Time Training (TTT) with Full-Model SGD Adaptation
author: FarnsworthTech
blurb: Standard 9x512 KV4 baseline training + test-time training during eval: single-epoch full-model SGD adaptation on validation data before scoring. TTT adapts all weights online with lr=3e-4 and momentum=0.95, treating eval as adaptive compression. Combined with sliding-window eval (stride=64). No architecture changes -- all gains come from smarter use of the 10-min eval budget.
